page_metadata.biotools__summary: The plugin Fijiyama (Yet Another Matching and Alignment tool for Fiji) is a generic tool for registration and alignment of 3D image series collected from various imaging modalities (MRI, X-rays, Microscopy, Photography, etc.).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The plugin Fijiyama (Yet Another Matching and Alignment tool for Fiji) is a generic tool for registration and alignment of 3D image series collected from various imaging modalities (MRI, X-rays, Microscopy, Photography, etc.).
